/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm@18/lib "CMakeFiles/napi_v8_tier1_tests.dir/Users/syrusakbary/Development/node-napi/node/deps/googletest/src/gtest-all.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/napi_v8_tier1_tests.dir/Users/syrusakbary/Development/node-napi/node/deps/googletest/src/gtest_main.cc.o" CMakeFiles/napi_v8_tier1_tests.dir/tier1_ported_runner.cc.o "CMakeFiles/napi_v8_tier1_tests.dir/ported/js-native-api/2_function_arguments/2_function_arguments.c.o" "CMakeFiles/napi_v8_tier1_tests.dir/ported/js-native-api/3_callbacks/3_callbacks.c.o" -o napi_v8_tier1_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/v8/lib ../libnapi_v8.a /opt/homebrew/opt/v8/lib/libv8.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/v8/lib/libv8_libplatform.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/v8/lib/libv8_libbase.dylib
